titleStmt.title: SII 23.91: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 91. (A.R. No. 91 of 1907.) Kalliḍaikkuṟichchi, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Nāgēśvaram-Uḍaiyār temple—on the same wall

summary.p: This is closely connected with No. 90 above, and records the grant of remission of antarāyam and other taxes on the land purchased by the temple from the assembly (as recorded in No. 90), and the issue of the kēḷvi and uḷvari documents to the temple containing the royal assent and the attestation of the same signed by his tax officers (Variyilār). Following the administrative procedure adopted in such cases of remission, the king who is introduced with the title Kōnerinmaikoṇḍān, was first informed of the purchase by his minister Kālingarāyar while he was camping at Kaḷakkuḍi, and his consent was then conveyed to the temple with permission to get the document engraved both on stone and copper. The inscription is dated at the end in the 9th year plus 4th (which latter is also expressed exactly as the 1430th day) of the king's reign. It may be observed here that the revenue officers mentioned at the end of the epigraph, also figure in a clear record of Jaṭāvarman Kulaśēkhara I (No. 97 of 1907 below) which is dated in the same year as this one. Hence this should be referred to Kulaśēkhara himself, with Vikrama-Pāṇḍya (of No. 90) as his predecessor.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ koneriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ muḷḷināṭṭu Irājarājaccaturvetimaṅkalattu teṉpiṭākai kal laṭaikkuṟicci ni
laiyuṭaiya pāṇṭiyaīśvaramuṭaiyār koyil tevarkaṉmikkum civa brāhmaṇarkkum Ittevarkkut tiruppaṭimāṟaṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭun nivanta
ṅkaḷukku Antarāyam Uṭpaṭa tevatāṉa Iṟaiiṟaiyiliyāka Ivvūr sabhaiyārpakkal Ittevar civanāmattāl Ivvūrt teṉpiṭākai Eli
vārattu vilaikoṇṭa nilam Aṟumāvaraikku vilaiyolaippaṭi kiḻellai paṭṭaṇacuvāmi Uḻutuvarukiṟa nilattut teṉvaṭal peruvarampukku me
ṟkum teṉṉellai cāttaṉūr peruṅkālukku vaṭakkum melellai Iḷaṅkāvaikku nirpāykiṟa vāyttalai paḻaṅkaālukku kiḻak kum vaṭave
llai Ikkālukku teṟkum Āka Iṉnāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa Iṉṉilam Aṟumāvaraiyum Oṉpatāvatiṉ ṉetir nālāmāṇṭu mutal Aṉ
tarāyam Uṭpaṭa tevatāṉam Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭampeṟaveṇumeṉṟu Aiyaṉ kāliṅkarāyar namakku coṉṉamaiyil Ittevaṟku tiruppa
ṭi māṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭun ṉimantaṅkaḻukku Antarāyam yuḷpaṭat teva tāṉa Iṟaiiliyāka Ivvūr [ sapai] yārpakkal Ivvūr teṉpiṭā kai
Elivārattu vilaikoṇṭa nilam Aṟumāvaraiyum Oṉpatāvatiṉ Etir nālāmāṇṭu mutal Antarāyam Uṭpaṭa tevatāṉam Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭuk keḻvi
yum variyilār Eḻuttiṭṭa yuḷvariyun taracco(ṉco)ṉṉom Ippaṭi cantirātittavaṟ celvatākak kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭiviccuk koḷka Ivai keraḻaci
ṅkavaḷanāṭṭu veḷiyāṟṟūr Uṭaiyāṉ civallavaṉ cikaiyyilāya muṭaiyāṉ tiyākāparaṇamuventa(venta)veḷāṉ Eḻuttu yāṇṭu 9 ḷ 1000 4 100 3 10- l Ivai
maturotayavaḷanāṭṭu kāṉaṉāṭṭirukkai Uḻakkuṭi Arayaṉamuta nampi yāṉa vayanāṭṭaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Aṇṭanāṭṭu perumaṇa lūr mantiri Ātita
tevaṉāṉa pallavarāyaṉe(e)ḻuttu . Āfter An Interval Of space— svastiśrī . yāṇṭu 9 ḷ 1000 4 100 3 10- ṉāl kaḷakkuṭiyil Eḻuntaruḷi Irukka niṉaippu . muḷḷināṭṭu Irāja
rājacaturvedimaṅkalattup piṭākai kallaṭaikkuṟicci nilaiuṭaiya pāṇṭiya Īśvaramuṭaiyāṟkut tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷu
kku Attarāyam Uṭpaṭa tevatāṉa Iṟaiiliyāka Ivvūr sabhaiyār pakkal Ittevar civanāmattāl Ivvūr teṉpiṭākai Elivārattu vilaikoṇ
ṭa nilam Aṟumāvaraikku vilai Olaippaṭi paṭṭaṇa cuvāmi Uḻutu varukiṟa nilattu teṉvaṭal vāykku meṟkum teṉṉellai cāttaṉūr
peruṅkālukku vaṭakkum melellai Iḷaṅkovaikku nirpāykiṟa vāy talaippaḻaṅkālukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭavellai Ikkālukkut teṟkum Āka Iṉṉāṉkellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa Innilam Aṟumāvaraiyum Oṉpatāvatiṉ Etir nālāmāṇṭu Antarāyam Uṭpaṭa tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili Āka Iṭappeṟaveṇumeṉṟu Aiyyaṉ kaāliṅkarāyaṉ namakku coṉṉamai yil Ittevaṟku tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷ
ḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukku Antarāyam Uṭpaṭa tevatāṉa Iṟaiyi liyāka Ivvūr yārpakkal Ivvūr koṇṭa nilam Aṟumāvarai yum Oṉpatāvatiṉ Etir nālāmāṇṭu mutal Antarāyam Uṭpaṭa tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭukaveṉṟum Ippaṭi cantirātitavaṟ celva tākak kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭivittukkoḷka veṉṟu tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉamaikku Ivai nantipaṉmaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 23.91 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
